"/><br></div>

<div><br></div>
<div><b>Week 2 Blog</b><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Multimodality is an inter-disciplinary approach that understands communication and representation to be more than about language. Over the past decade, developments systematically address much-debated questions about society's changes concerning new media and technologies.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>The benefits of Multimodal projects: promote more interactivity, portrays information in multiple ways, adapt projects to befit different audiences, retain focus better since more senses are processing information, and allows for more flexibility and creativity to present information.</div>
